name: Elizabeth's S'more Bars
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (180 degrees C). Lightly grease a 13 x 9 x 2 inch pan.
2 In a large mixing bowl, combine sugar, butter and egg until creamy (2 or 3 minutes).
Reduce the speed of the mixer and add flour, baking powder and salt until blended.
3 Spread the batter into the prepared pan. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes, until set.
4 Sprinkle chopped chocolate bar over the batter and top with marshmallows and peanuts.
Continue baking for 10 to 12 minutes, or until the marshmallows are lightly browned.
5 Cool completely, then cut into bars. Makes 3 dozen.
Note: I use chocolate chips instead of the candy bar.
